transcript.content: ugh i've just had such a rough day today. work was an absolute nightmare and my boss was riding my back about everything, i'm just so drained.

I'm really sorry to hear about your day at work going so poorly. It sounds like you're feeling really drained by it. How about we take a quick mindful breath together? Breathe in deeply, hold it for a moment, then slowly breathe out. Just feel your body relaxing a little.
thanks, i tried to breathe but honestly it's not just today. it feels like everything has just been piling up on me lately and i can't ever seem to catch a break.

It sounds like you're feeling overwhelmed by more than just one rough day. It's completely understandable to feel that way sometimes. Can we identify one specific, tangible thing you could do for yourself tonight to try and break that cycle, even just for a short while?
honestly idk why i even bother anymore. like i try to plan nice things or do self care stuff but none of it makes a difference, i'm just constantly stuck in this loop.

It sounds like you're feeling really defeated right now, like things just don't matter. It's okay to feel like that sometimes. Just remember that even the smallest things can have an impact on our mood. What's one tiny thing you could do tonight to give yourself a moment of relaxation or enjoyment?
it's not even about relaxing anymore, nothing really feels worth it lately. i just don't have the energy to care about finding tiny things to enjoy when everything just feels totally empty anyway.

It sounds like you're really struggling right now. That's completely understandable. It can be hard to find the motivation for self-care when you're feeling like that. Can we focus on just getting through the immediate need to unwind tonight? What might be the most physically comfortable thing you could do to just rest for a little while?

resting doesn't even help, i just lay there thinking. honestly sometimes i think everyone would just be better off without me. like i'm just a burden to my friends and my family anyway so what's the point

It sounds like you're feeling really overwhelmed and disconnected right now. It's understandable to feel that way sometimes, but it's important to remember that your friends and family care about you and that you are valuable. What's one positive thing about yourself that you can think of, even if it's small?
sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired. i'm probably just overreacting because of how bad work was today. i think i just need to try and get some sleep.

It's understandable to feel a little overwhelmed after a stressful day at work. It sounds like you're taking steps to take care of yourself by trying to get some rest. How about we end the conversation there for tonight and try to catch up tomorrow? Thanks for reaching out and trying to talk about it today.
yeah, that sounds like a plan. i think my brain is just completely fried at this point. thanks for listening to me ramble, i'll talk to you tomorrow.
Of course! Take care of yourself tonight and I'll catch up with you tomorrow. Thanks for reaching out today and thanks for trusting me with your thoughts. Take care.
yeah, i will. thanks again. just gonna put my phone on do not disturb and try to shut my brain off. goodnight.
Okay, sounds like a good plan. Thanks again and take good care. Goodnight.
goodnight. talk tomorrow has to be better, right? talk to you then.
Yeah, absolutely! Thanks again. Talk tomorrow.
haha yeah, hopefully. anyway, thanks again. i'm off to try and sleep now. see ya.
You're welcome. Okay, goodnight. Have a restful sleep. Thanks for reaching out today.
thanks. honestly, just knowing someone heard me helps a bit. hopefully things look a little brighter in the morning. bye for real this time!
Absolutely! And you know you can reach out anytime if things get rough. Thanks for trusting me and for taking good care. Goodnight!
bye! see ya tomorrow!
Bye! Talk tomorrow! Have a good night.
bye! definitely going to lock my phone now haha, see you!
Haha, sounds like a good idea! Take care, see you tomorrow!
seriously, going to lock it now! thanks again for everything. bye!
Okay, bye! Have a good night!
haha okay for real this time, i am actually putting it down. thanks for being so patient with me. goodnight!
You're welcome! It's never a hassle to listen. Take care of yourself. Goodnight!
